title: Add ECDH round-trip integration test
description: Add a test in wolfcrypt-conformance/tests/ (either a new ecdh.rs or appended to an existing file) that exercises the full key lifecycle: (1) Generate keypair A via NistEcdhSecret::generate(). (2) Generate keypair B via NistEcdhSecret::generate(). (3) Compute shared = A.diffie_hellman(B.public_key()). (4) Compute shared2 = B.diffie_hellman(A.public_key()). (5) Assert shared == shared2. Run for both P-256 and P-384. Also test wrong-key rejection: use A's private with C's public, B's private with A's public, assert they produce different secrets. Gate on wolfssl_ecc (no wolfssl_openssl_extra required).
